---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
---

**Summary**
A short description of the requested feature.

**Motivation**
Why is this feature needed and who will benefit?

**Proposed solution (high level)**
Describe a potential approach and trade-offs.

**Acceptance criteria / Tests**
What tests or acceptance criteria would show this is done?

**Constitution compliance**
Which Constitution principle(s) does this affect and how will the plan satisfy required gates (tests, security, observability)?
